labels.dropzone: Drop .tce, .tle, or .txt file to load catalog
labels.keepSatInfoTooltip: Update TLEs for existing satellites while preserving name, country, and mission data. Satellites not in the imported file are removed.

help.overview: Catalog Management moves satellite data in and out of KeepTrack. The Import tab loads a catalog file from disk, replacing or updating the current catalog; the Export tab writes the live catalog out in several formats, from plain TLE files to spreadsheets and STK products.
help.imgAlt: The Catalog Management menu with Import and Export tabs
help.imgCaption: Import a catalog file, or export the live catalog in several formats.
help.import: Load a .tce, .tle, or .txt file with the Import Catalog button or by dragging the file onto the drop zone. With Keep Satellite Information enabled, existing satellites keep their names, countries, and mission data and only their orbits update; satellites missing from the file are removed. Disabled, the file replaces the catalog wholesale.
help.export:
• Orbital Elements: download TLE/3LE element sets. Choose a Source (Official keeps only real cataloged objects; KeepTrack includes analyst satellites you created) and a Format (2-line, or 3-line with the satellite name), then Download TLE.
  • Tabular & STK: export the full catalog as an XLSX spreadsheet, an STK .tce database, or only the satellites currently inside the selected sensor's field of view.
  • Selected Satellite: with a satellite selected, write a propagated STK .e ephemeris using the Time Span (hrs) and Step Size (sec) you set.
help.howToUse:
1. Open Catalog Management from the bottom bar (Tools mode).
  2. To import: pick the Import tab, choose whether to keep satellite information, then select or drop a file.
  3. To export: pick the Export tab, set any options, and click the export you need; files download immediately.
  4. For per-satellite exports, select a satellite first; those buttons stay disabled until one is selected.
help.tip1: Keep Satellite Information is the safe default when refreshing orbits from a newer TLE file; turn it off only when deliberately swapping the whole catalog.
help.tip2: Imports and edits live only in your session; export before reloading the page if you want to keep them.
